title: diporidium schweinfurthianum
side_effects: Diporidium schweinfurthianum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds has also been linked to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, improper use of diporidium schweinfurthianum may lead to kidney damage, liver toxicity, and even cardiovascular problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
